name: Codex Desktop App Automation
description: Battle-tested playbook for OpenAI Codex desktop app automation via CDP. Covers thread creation, prompt submission, result reading, sidebar navigation, and menu actions. Requires launching Codex with --remote-debugging-port flag.

launch.notes: Must launch with --remote-debugging-port to enable CDP. Default port 9333 avoids conflict with Chrome on 9222.

prompt.placeholder_text: Ask Codex anything, @ to add files, / for commands

header.notes: Hand off only visible in completed threads. Commit has dropdown arrow.

detection.get_page_id: curl -s http://127.0.0.1:9333/json/list | python3 -c "import sys,json; pages=[p for p in json.load(sys.stdin) if p['type']=='page']; print(pages[0]['id'] if pages else '')"

submit_prompt.description: Type a prompt and submit it to Codex

steps.notes: execCommand is the ONLY reliable method. Direct value/innerHTML setting breaks ProseMirror state.
modifiers: 4 = Meta/Cmd key. Must send both keyDown and keyUp.

methods.notes: Only works when Codex has keyboard focus

read_result.description: Read the result of a completed task

sidebar_navigate.description: Click a thread in the sidebar
sidebar_navigate.notes: Use OCR-based click_text with the thread title, or CDP querySelectorAll on sidebar links

errors.error: VS Code steals keyboard focus during type_text
errors.cause: Claude Code outputs text in VS Code terminal between focus and type, bringing VS Code to front
errors.fix: Use CDP execCommand instead of type_text. CDP operates at browser level regardless of OS focus.

errors.error: AppleScript keystroke does not reach prompt
errors.cause: Codex is an Electron app. The prompt is a ProseMirror web component inside a WebView, not a native text field. System Events keystroke cannot target web components.
errors.fix: Use CDP with --remote-debugging-port=9333. Connect via WebSocket and use Runtime.evaluate + execCommand.

errors.error: DOM value setter does not update React state
errors.cause: Setting textarea.value or innerHTML directly bypasses React/ProseMirror state management. The visual display does not update.
errors.fix: Use document.execCommand('insertText', false, text) which triggers proper ProseMirror input handling.

errors.cause: Node.js WebSocket resolves localhost to IPv6 (::1) but Codex only listens on IPv4

errors.error: Sidebar Settings click does not open Settings page
errors.cause: The sidebar 'Settings' is a collapsible section header containing Automations and Skills, not a navigation button to app settings
errors.fix: Use menu: Codex/Settings… via menu_click(pid, 'Codex/Settings…'). This opens the actual Settings panel with General, Configuration, MCP servers, Git, etc.

errors.cause: Clicked Create button at wrong coordinates or prompt not focused
errors.fix: Use CDP Input.dispatchKeyEvent with modifiers:4 (Meta) + Enter. Always focus .ProseMirror first.

architecture.accessibility_tree: 382 elements total, but main content is unlabeled AXGroup hierarchy
architecture.cdp_pages: 1 main page (type: page, title: Codex) + 3-4 workers

cdp_helper.description: Node.js helper to interact with Codex desktop app via CDP

settings.access: Menu: Codex/Settings… (sidebar 'Settings' is section label, not direct navigation)

options: Import external agent config (Claude skills → Codex skills)

templates: Summarize CI failures and flaky tests
Add focused tests for untested paths
Check CI failures by root cause

key_discoveries: ProseMirror editor + CDP execCommand + Input.dispatchKeyEvent Cmd+Enter is the only reliable flow for prompt input
Settings page accessible via menu Codex/Settings… NOT sidebar Settings button (which is a section label)
Sidebar Skills/Automations buttons require clicking the BUTTON element, not the text SPAN
Hand off button only appears in completed thread headers
click_text works for sidebar thread navigation
Cmd+N works for new thread when Codex has focus
MCP servers (including ScreenHand 'sh') visible and configurable in Settings
